articles.author: Al Jazeera
articles.title: Legendary Indian Bollywood singer Asha Bhosle dies aged 92 - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Bhosle recorded more than 12,000 songs in multiple Indian languages over a seven-decade career.
articles.content:
Legendary Indian playback singer Asha Bhosle, whose voice defined Bollywood music through the 1970s and 80s, died in Mumbai aged 92, her family says.
The two-time Grammy nominee died on Sunday at th… [+2258 chars]
